title: v2 invoke request (deferred completion protocol)
description: Request body a host sends to a plugin action to invoke it under contract_version 2. Adds host_api_base_url so the plugin can construct the fixed callback path without guessing or being handed a full callback URL (anti-SSRF: the plugin must only ever POST to <host_api_base_url> + the fixed callback path documented in docs/protocol.md). The shared HMAC secret is never carried in this payload. This schema is domain-neutral: the 'input' property is an opaque, action-specific payload whose shape is out of scope for this repository.

contract_version.description: Fixed to 2; activates the deferred completion protocol semantics for this invocation.

input.description: Opaque, action-specific input payload. Domain-neutral by design; this repository imposes no constraints on its shape.
